title: Infinity & Mending Book
description: Adds a craftable book with both Infinity and Mending, bypassing vanilla restrictions.
body:
# Infinity Mending Book

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dmQhcCp6epw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to a new level of enchantment freedom with **Infinity Mending Book**!

In vanilla Minecraft, **Infinity** and **Mending** cannot exist together. This project removes that limitation by allowing you to merge both enchantments into a single enchanted book.

This release is available as both:
- ✅ Datapack  
- ✅ Mod (NeoForge / Forge / Fabric / Quilt)

Now you can freely apply the combined book to your bow without restrictions.

---

## How to Use

1. Drop both enchanted books (Mending and Infinity) on top of an anvil.
2. Pick up your new combined enchanted book.

---

Enjoy the power of infinite arrows and automatic repair — together in one enchantment book.

Download **Infinity Mending Book** now and enhance your Minecraft experience!
